name: open-forge
description: Self-host open-source apps on your own cloud, your own VPS, your own Kubernetes cluster, a PaaS, or your own laptop. Chat-friendly interface to existing tools (aws, az, hcloud, doctl, gcloud, flyctl, kubectl, podman, docker, lume, tailscale, ssh, gh) — Claude runs every command; you only answer what/where/how and provide credentials. Supported software: Ghost, OpenClaw, Hermes-Agent. For OpenClaw, every upstream-blessed install path documented at docs.openclaw.ai/install/* is covered. For Hermes-Agent (Nous Research's self-improving AI agent), every upstream install path is covered: scripts/install.sh (Linux/macOS/WSL2), Docker (registry image + docker-compose), Nix (flake + NixOS module with native or container modes), manual dev (uv venv), Termux (Android), Homebrew. Includes guidance for `hermes claw migrate` (importing from OpenClaw).
